File: /Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/multi-select-editor.test.tsx

Failing tests:
- MultiSelectEditor > reference field (assignees) > shows existing selections as prefixed tokens in the doc
- MultiSelectEditor > reference field (assignees) > multiple selections appear as separate tokens in the doc
- MultiSelectEditor > reference field (assignees) > deleting a token from the doc removes it from committed value
- MultiSelectEditor > computed tag field > Enter commits tag slugs via onCommit (received "tag-bug" instead of "bug")
- MultiSelectEditor > computed tag field > deleting a tag token from the doc removes it from committed value (doc contains "tag-bug" instead of "#bug")
Fix failing tests: MultiSelectEditor - reference field tokens, tag field slugs and display (5 tests)
